label: L8.8 Golden Evidence Pack / External FDTD Acceptance Campaign

scenarios.label: Transparent slab
scenarios.referenceDescription: Planar TMM slab R/T/A stabilizes as grid density increases.

warnings.message: Sweep contains 36 external runs; review cost before launching an external solver.

scenarios.label: Absorbing slab
scenarios.referenceDescription: Beer-Lambert attenuation residual and energy balance stabilize as grid density increases.

warnings.message: Sweep contains 36 external runs; review cost before launching an external solver.

scenarios.label: Reflective plate
scenarios.referenceDescription: Ideal mirror reflectance stays near 1 while transmission stays near 0.

warnings.message: Sweep contains 36 external runs; review cost before launching an external solver.

scenarios.label: Long slit aperture
scenarios.referenceDescription: Long-slit scalar limiting case: minima satisfy a sin(theta) = m lambda.

warnings.message: Long-slit aperture has flux monitors within two wavelengths of the scatterer in the generated helper scene; move monitors farther away for production convergence runs.
Long-slit aperture has aperture edges; treat downstream fields as diagnostic until resolution/PML convergence is shown.
Long-slit aperture finite FDTD screen is compared only to scalar limiting-case diffraction references; finite thickness and finite screen size can shift residuals.
Scalar diffraction reference is a limiting-case check for diagnostic comparison, not an exact finite FDTD screen solution.
Near-field slices are not the same as far-field diffraction patterns; use far-field or downstream observation evidence with convergence.
Current aperture/blocker diagnostics require convergence sweep evidence before physical interpretation.
Flux monitor is within two wavelengths of aperture/blocker edges.
Aperture edges are staircasing-sensitive at this grid density; increase resolution and compare residual trends.

scenarios.label: Circular aperture
scenarios.referenceDescription: Circular aperture scalar limiting case: first dark ring is near 1.22 lambda z / D.

warnings.message: Circular pinhole aperture has flux monitors within two wavelengths of the scatterer in the generated helper scene; move monitors farther away for production convergence runs.
Circular pinhole aperture has aperture edges; treat downstream fields as diagnostic until resolution/PML convergence is shown.
Circular pinhole aperture finite FDTD screen is compared only to scalar limiting-case diffraction references; finite thickness and finite screen size can shift residuals.
Scalar diffraction reference is a limiting-case check for diagnostic comparison, not an exact finite FDTD screen solution.
Near-field slices are not the same as far-field diffraction patterns; use far-field or downstream observation evidence with convergence.
Current aperture/blocker diagnostics require convergence sweep evidence before physical interpretation.
Flux monitor is within two wavelengths of aperture/blocker edges.
Aperture edges are staircasing-sensitive at this grid density; increase resolution and compare residual trends.

scenarios.label: Multi-element chain
scenarios.purpose: Ordered optical bench workflow, solver routing, monitor stack, and external evidence receipts
scenarios.referenceDescription: Ordered elements route scalar-capable stages to scalar preview and finite elements to external FDTD evidence receipts.

warnings.message: Transparent block 1 is finite geometry; scalar preview stops at a placement/attenuation diagnostic and requires imported external FDTD evidence.
Absorbing blocker 1 is finite geometry; scalar preview stops at a placement/attenuation diagnostic and requires imported external FDTD evidence.
Bundled L8.5 multi-element evidence is deterministic fixture data for UI/report validation, not a browser-run FDTD solve.

scenarios.label: Robust candidate before/after
scenarios.purpose: L8.6 process variation plus L8.7 robust-advisor candidate improvement
scenarios.referenceDescription: Best robust candidate is compared against the deterministic-grid baseline pass rate, expected score, and worst-case score.

warnings.message: Transparent block 1 is finite geometry; scalar preview stops at a placement/attenuation diagnostic and requires imported external FDTD evidence.
Absorbing blocker 1 is finite geometry; scalar preview stops at a placement/attenuation diagnostic and requires imported external FDTD evidence.
Bundled L8.5 multi-element evidence is deterministic fixture data for UI/report validation, not a browser-run FDTD solve.

notes: Remaining failure Circular aperture 1 x decenter +/-5 um

capabilityTruthTable.label: Engineering Evidence Campaign
capabilityTruthTable.evidence: L8.8 campaign manifest, golden summary, scenario table, convergence review, tolerance/robust summaries, and dossier exports.

capabilityTruthTable.label: Golden scenario validation dossier
capabilityTruthTable.evidence: Deterministic transparent, absorbing, reflective, aperture, multi-element, and robust candidate scenarios are bundled.

capabilityTruthTable.label: External FDTD evidence import
capabilityTruthTable.evidence: Manifest/script/hash receipts and imported field/flux/convergence summaries are accepted; browser does not execute FDTD.

capabilityTruthTable.label: Planar TMM/Fresnel references
capabilityTruthTable.evidence: Transparent slab/interface and mirror/absorber references reuse existing L8.0/L8.2 analytic/TMM paths.

capabilityTruthTable.label: Aperture scalar limiting references
capabilityTruthTable.evidence: L8.4 long-slit and circular-pinhole scalar references and convergence diagnostics are included.

capabilityTruthTable.label: L8.6 tolerance evidence
capabilityTruthTable.evidence: Deterministic-grid tolerance report and FDTD variation sweep fixture hashes are preserved.

capabilityTruthTable.label: L8.7 robust before/after evidence
capabilityTruthTable.evidence: Best candidate before/after metrics and external candidate sweep receipt hashes are preserved.

capabilityTruthTable.label: ExternalFdtdBackend
capabilityTruthTable.evidence: Registered/export/import scaffold only; no in-browser solver execution.

capabilityTruthTable.label: Certified validation
capabilityTruthTable.evidence: L8.8 is an evidence dossier, not V&V certification.

capabilityTruthTable.label: Production EM solver certification
capabilityTruthTable.evidence: No production Maxwell solver, certified tolerancing, FEM/BEM/RCWA, or manufacturing certification is claimed.

unsupportedItems.label: In-browser FDTD execution
unsupportedItems.reason: The web app exports/imports external evidence only.

unsupportedItems.label: Arbitrary 3D Maxwell/CAD solve
unsupportedItems.reason: Current 3D work is schema/export/import scaffolding and diagnostics, not a full 3D solver.

unsupportedItems.label: FEM/BEM/RCWA execution
unsupportedItems.reason: No FEM, BEM, or RCWA backend is shipped.

unsupportedItems.label: Certified optical tolerancing
unsupportedItems.reason: L8.6/L8.7/L8.8 are diagnostic engineering aids only.

unsupportedItems.label: Automatic final design approval
unsupportedItems.reason: Robust candidates require explicit user application and review.

unsupportedItems.label: Digital twin / manufacturing certification
unsupportedItems.reason: No measured hardware loop, manufacturing line, or certified metrology process is implemented.

boundary: L8.8 is an engineer-facing evidence/reporting campaign over existing L8.x scenes, references, convergence summaries, tolerance results, and robust-advisor receipts.
Golden campaign fixtures are deterministic diagnostic evidence and import contracts; external FDTD execution remains optional and outside the browser.
Iteration count is not validation. This dossier reports runnable evidence, references, residuals, convergence behavior, and limitations.

The campaign is not certified validation, certified tolerancing, automatic final design approval, in-browser FDTD, arbitrary 3D Maxwell/CAD execution, FEM/BEM/RCWA, production EM solving, digital twin behavior, or manufacturing certification.
